query:
WITH completed AS (
            INSERT INTO v2_job_completed
                (workspace_id, id, started_at, duration_ms, result,
                 flow_status, workflow_as_code_status, status, worker)
            SELECT
                q.workspace_id, q.id, q.started_at,
                (EXTRACT('epoch' FROM now()) - EXTRACT('epoch' FROM COALESCE(q.started_at, now()))) * 1000,
                $3::text::jsonb,
                s.flow_status,
                s.workflow_as_code_status,
                'skipped'::job_status,
                q.worker
            FROM v2_job_queue q
            LEFT JOIN v2_job_status s ON s.id = q.id
            WHERE q.id = $1
            ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET status = EXCLUDED.status, result = EXCLUDED.result
            RETURNING 1 AS x
        ), _deleted AS (
            DELETE FROM v2_job_queue WHERE id = $1
        ), _logged AS (
            INSERT INTO job_logs (logs, job_id, workspace_id)
            VALUES ($4, $1, $2)
            ON CONFLICT (job_id) DO UPDATE SET logs = concat(job_logs.logs, EXCLUDED.logs)
        )
        SELECT x FROM completed
